description: Jellycat Blossom bunny — sewing and cleaning.
itemDetails:
Jellycat Blossom Bunny is a recognized modern plush line from Jellycat London, a UK brand founded in 1999 and known for soft contemporary nursery designs. Blossom variants are notable for their floral-print ear and foot fabric accents within the Bashful family style.

Construction uses high-quality polyester plush with embroidered facial details and soft fill; floral panels are usually cotton blend prints. Collector demand for Jellycat is strong, and retired colorways or sizes can command premium resale when tags and condition are excellent.
